title: Cleanup man pages
body:
Format md files to work properly when converted to man pages.
Add sed command to cleanup table in podman man page.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Do we lose author info with this?

Otherwise LGTM
@mheon Author is in the bottom of the man page.
Dates too, are they present at the bottom on the pages that used to have them?  Otherwise LGTM

Yes the date of the creation/modification is recorded at the bottom of the man pages.
For some reason travis is not completing.
the failure is a flake.  Fine to merge this PR?

Yeah, I think we're safe to merge if Travis is just flaking.
@rh-atomic-bot r+
